hero.description: Transform your camera into an intelligent assistant. Snap a photo of any problem and get step-by-step solutions instantly.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From problem to solution in 5 simple steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Point your camera at the problem or describe it by voice
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI instantly identifies the issue and difficulty level
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive a step-by-step plan with tools, costs, and safety warnings
howItWorks.step4Desc: Follow along with progress tracking and step verification
howItWorks.step5Desc: Camera overlay shows exactly what to do next in real-time

features.title: Smart Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to fix anything, all in one app
features.arDesc: Real-time camera overlay guides you through each step
features.aiDesc: Get answers in 5-15 seconds powered by Google Gemini
features.stepDesc: Tap any step for detailed micro-instructions
features.verifyDesc: Photo confirmation ensures you did it right
features.shopDesc: Find parts with prices from local stores
features.costDesc: See DIY cost vs hiring a professional
features.safetyDesc: Risk levels and "call a pro" warnings
features.toolboxDesc: Track your tools for personalized plans

categories.title: Works on Everything
categories.subtitle: From home repairs to plants — SnapStep handles it all

testimonials.title: Loved by Fixers
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands who've solved their problems with SnapStep
testimonials.quote1: Fixed my leaking faucet in 20 minutes. The AR mode made it super easy to see exactly where to tighten. Saved me $150 on a plumber!
testimonials.quote2: My car's check engine light was on. SnapStep identified it as a loose gas cap. Crisis averted in 30 seconds. This app is incredible.
testimonials.quote3: As a landlord, this is a game-changer. I can diagnose tenant issues before calling maintenance. Already saved hundreds this month.
testimonials.quote4: My houseplant was dying and I had no idea why. SnapStep told me it was overwatered and gave me a recovery plan. Plant is thriving now!

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade anytime. No hidden fees.
pricing.footer: All plans include access to iOS and Android apps with no ads and no data selling.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about SnapStep
faq.a1: SnapStep handles 7 categories: home repairs (pipes, wiring, appliances), automotive (engine lights, fluids, brakes), electronics (phones, laptops, TVs), plants & garden (diseases, pests, soil), cooking & food (recipes, substitutions), documents (scan, translate), and anything else you can photograph.
faq.q2: How does the AI analysis work?
faq.a2: Powered by Google Gemini, SnapStep analyzes your photo in 5-15 seconds, identifies the problem, assesses difficulty, and generates a personalized step-by-step repair plan with required tools, parts with prices, safety warnings, and time estimates.
faq.a3: Yes! The free tier includes 3 AI analyses per month with no ads, no data selling, and no credit card required. You can upgrade to Pro for unlimited analyses and advanced features like AR Live Mode anytime.
faq.q4: Do I need to create an account?
faq.a4: No. You can start using SnapStep immediately as a guest. When you create an account (optional), all your analyses and history are preserved and synced across devices.
faq.a5: AR Live Mode overlays repair instructions directly on your camera feed in real-time. It shows you exactly where to turn, what to connect, and what to inspect as you work — like having an expert looking over your shoulder.
faq.a6: Absolutely. We never sell your data. Sign in with Google or Apple. You can delete your account and all data anytime. We're GDPR compliant and your photos are processed securely.
faq.a7: SnapStep is currently available in English and Ukrainian, with more languages coming soon.
faq.a8: Our AI is highly accurate for common issues and provides safety warnings when professional help is needed. It learns from millions of repair scenarios and is constantly improving. For critical issues, it will always recommend contacting a professional.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Text: By accessing or using SnapStep, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use our services.
terms.section2Text: SnapStep provides an AI-powered assistant that analyzes images to provide information and solutions. You agree to use this service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.
terms.section3Text: All content, features, and functionality of SnapStep are owned by SnapStep AI and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
terms.section4Text: SnapStep AI shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use our services.
terms.section5Text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of any significant changes by posting the new terms on this page.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text: At SnapStep, we prioritize your privacy. When you use our camera-based AI assistant, we process image data locally or securely on our servers to provide you with instant solutions. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.section2Text: The images you capture are used solely for analysis and problem-solving purposes. We may use anonymized data to improve our AI models and provide a better user experience.
privacy.section3Text: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information. Your connection to our services is encrypted, and we regularly audit our systems for potential vulnerabilities.
privacy.section4Text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information at any time. If you have any questions about your data, please contact our support team.
